hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q '^git commit'; then echo 'Running tests before commit...' && bin/exec go test ./...; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.go ]]; then bin/exec go vet ./... 2>&1 | tail -30; fi
